## Component: BIG NUMBER (CP-KPI-02)

The one number a page exists for: caps label, display-size value, one context line. One per page maximum.

### Geometry (px, follow literally)

```json
{
  "label_size": 11,
  "label_dy": 0,
  "value_size": 56,
  "value_dy": 58,
  "context_size": 12,
  "context_dy": 80
}
```

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| label | body |
| value | primary |
| context | body |

### Rules
- one big number per page; two big numbers mean no message
- the context line names the reference, always
- value in the display font, primary role

### QA
- [ ] one per page
- [ ] context references named
- [ ] label in caps
